sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62309" key="leiyifah/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειψῐ-φᾰής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n62309.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">waning</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σελήνη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:455" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">455</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.34</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
